mnemonics: M-I-C-K-E-Y: Manageable Infrastructure for Cloud-based Knowledge Engineering Yard
keyPoints: Cloud Application Suites (CAS): Offered to deploy applications in the cloud.
Manageable Infrastructure for Cloud-based Knowledge Engineering Yard (MICKEY): Allows users to manage infrastructure for knowledge engineering in the cloud.
Cloud Service Model (CSM):  A consumable service for delivering IT resources over the internet.
Platform as a Service (PaaS): Provides a complete platform for developing, running, and managing applications in the cloud.
Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS): Provides virtualized computing resources over the internet to users on-demand.
Cloud Deployment Models: Public, Private, Hybrid, Community, and Managed.
